The WOFF2 validation fixture is Lato Regular v22 (Latin subset), sourced from
the `woff2-patched 0.4.0` crate test resources. Lato is Copyright 2010-2014
Łukasz Dziedzic and distributed under the SIL Open Font License 1.1.

The font is Base64-encoded so the repository can keep the fixture reviewable as
text. Tests decode it in memory and never ship it in release archives.
